name: bytedance_seedance_video
description: Generate videos with ByteDance Seedance 2.0 — multimodal inputs (image/video/audio references), native audio generation, standard and fast modes

prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation (3-20000 characters)

mode.description: Generation mode — standard (seedance-2, higher quality) or fast (seedance-2-fast, iterative workflows)

first_frame_url.description: URL of image to use as the first frame (optional)

last_frame_url.description: URL of image to use as the last frame (optional)

reference_image_urls.description: Reference images for style/subject guidance (up to 9)

reference_video_urls.description: Reference videos for motion/style guidance (up to 3)

reference_audio_urls.description: Reference audio for sound-guided generation (up to 3)

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video

resolution.description: Video resolution — 480p for faster, 720p for balance

generate_audio.description: Generate native audio for the video

web_search.description: Enable web search to enhance prompt understanding

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: bytedance_seedream_image
description: Generate and edit images using ByteDance Seedream models (supports V4 and V5 Lite with 3K output). V5 Lite offers enhanced detail fidelity, multi-image fusion up to 14 refs, and clear small-text rendering

prompt.description: Text prompt for image generation or editing. V4: max 5000 chars, V5 Lite: max 3000 chars (API returns 500 error if exceeded)

image_urls.description: Array of image URLs for editing mode (optional - if not provided, uses text-to-image). V4: max 10, V4.5: max 14

version.description: Seedream version: '4' for V4, '5-lite' for V5 Lite (default) with enhanced features

max_images.description: Number of images to generate (V4 only)

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible results (V4 only, use -1 for random)

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for V5 Lite output (V5 Lite only)

quality.description: Output quality for V5 Lite (V5 Lite only): 'basic' = 2K, 'high' = 3K resolution

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: elevenlabs_tts
description: Generate speech from text using ElevenLabs TTS models (Turbo 2.5 by default, with optional Multilingual v2 support)

text.description: The text to convert to speech (max 5000 characters)

model.description: TTS model to use - turbo (faster, default) or multilingual (supports context)

voice.description: Voice to use for speech generation

timestamps.description: Whether to return timestamps for each word

previous_text.description: Text that came before current request (multilingual model only, max 5000 characters)

next_text.description: Text that comes after current request (multilingual model only, max 5000 characters)

language_code.description: Language code (ISO 639-1) for language enforcement (turbo model only)

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: elevenlabs_ttsfx
description: Generate sound effects from text descriptions using ElevenLabs Sound Effects v2 model

text.description: The text describing the sound effect to generate (max 5000 characters)

loop.description: Whether to create a sound effect that loops smoothly

duration_seconds.description: Duration in seconds (0.5-22). If not specified, optimal duration will be determined from prompt

prompt_influence.description: How closely to follow the prompt (0-1). Higher values mean less variation

output_format.description: Output format of the generated audio

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: flux_kontext_image
description: Generate or edit images using Flux Kontext AI models (unified tool for text-to-image generation and image editing)

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image or edit (max 5000 characters, English recommended)

inputImage.description: Input image URL for editing mode (required for image editing, omit for text-to-image generation)

model.description: Model version to use for generation

enableTranslation.description: Automatically translate non-English prompts to English

promptUpsampling.description: Enable prompt enhancement for better results (may increase processing time)

safetyTolerance.description: Content moderation level (0-6 for generation, 0-2 for editing)

uploadCn.description: Route uploads via China servers for better performance in Asia

watermark.description: Watermark identifier to add to the generated image

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: flux2_image
description: Generate and edit images using Black Forest Labs' Flux 2 models (Pro/Flex) with multi-reference consistency, photoreal detail, and accurate text rendering

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image (3-5000 characters)

input_urls.description: Reference images for image-to-image mode (1-8 URLs). Omit for text-to-image mode.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image. 'auto' only valid with input_urls.

model_type.description: Model variant: 'pro' for fast reliable results, 'flex' for more control and fine-tuning.

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: get_task_status
description: Get the status of a generation task with intelligent polling guidance. Returns task status, results, and recommended polling strategy (interval, timing, next steps) based on task type (image/video/audio).

task_id.description: Task ID to check status for

name: gpt_image_2
description: Generate images using GPT Image 2 (text-to-image and image-to-image with up to 16 reference images)

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image (max 20000 characters)

input_urls.description: Array of up to 16 image URLs for image-to-image mode. Omit for text-to-image.

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: grok_imagine
description: Generate images and videos using xAI's Grok Imagine (4 modes: text-to-image, text-to-video, image-to-video, upscale). Supports synchronized audio with video. Pricing: ~$0.10 per 6-second video

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired content (required for text modes, optional for image-to-video)

image_urls.description: Single image URL for image-to-video mode (alternative to task_id)

task_id.description: Task ID from a previous Grok generation (for upscale or image-to-video from generated image)

index.description: Image index from task_id (0-5, Grok generates 6 images per task)

mode.description: Generation style: 'normal' (default), 'fun' (playful), 'spicy' (expressive, not available with external images)

generation_mode.description: Explicit mode selection (auto-detected if not provided): text-to-image, text-to-video, image-to-video, or upscale

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications

name: hailuo_video
description: Generate videos using Hailuo AI models (unified tool for text-to-video and image-to-video with standard/pro quality). Supports v02 (original) and v2.3 (enhanced motion/expressions, 1080P)

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired video content (max 1500 characters)

imageUrl.description: URL of input image for image-to-video mode (optional - if not provided, uses text-to-video)

endImageUrl.description: URL of end frame image for image-to-video (optional - requires imageUrl)

version.description: Hailuo model version: '02' (original) or '2.3' (better motion, expressions, 1080P support)

quality.description: Quality level of video generation (standard for faster, pro for higher quality)

duration.description: Duration of video in seconds (standard quality only). Note: 10s not supported with 1080P in v2.3

resolution.description: Resolution of video (standard quality only). v02: 512P/768P, v2.3: 768P/1080P

promptOptimizer.description: Whether to use the model's prompt optimizer for better results

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: happyhorse_video
description: Generate videos using Alibaba HappyHorse 1.0 (text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video with up to 9 images, video-edit with native audio)

mode.description: Generation mode: text-to-video (default), image-to-video, reference-to-video, or video-edit. Auto-detected from parameters if omitted.

prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation (max 5000 characters)

image_urls.description: Input image URL for image-to-video mode (max 1)

reference_image.description: Reference images for reference-to-video mode (up to 9)

reference_image_edit.description: Reference images for video-edit mode (up to 5)

audio_setting.description: Audio handling for video-edit: auto or origin

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications

name: ideogram_reframe
description: Reframe images to different aspect ratios and sizes using Ideogram V3 Reframe model

image_url.description: URL of image to reframe (JPEG, PNG, WEBP, max 10MB)

image_size.description: Output size for the reframed image

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: infinitalk_lip_sync
description: Generate AI lip-sync talking videos using MeiGen-AI InfiniTalk. Transforms portrait image + audio into natural talking avatar with synchronized lips, facial expressions, and head movements. Pricing: ~$0.015/s (480p), ~$0.06/s (720p), max 15s

image_url.description: URL of the portrait image to animate (JPEG, PNG, WEBP, max 10MB)

audio_url.description: URL of the audio file for lip sync (MPEG, WAV, AAC, MP4, OGG, max 10MB)

prompt.description: Text prompt to guide video generation (e.g., 'A young woman talking on a podcast')

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications

name: kling_avatar
description: Generate lifelike talking avatar videos using Kuaishou Kling AI. Transforms portrait photo + audio into realistic avatar with accurate lip-sync, emotions, and identity preservation. Pricing: ~$0.04/s (720P standard), ~$0.08/s (1080P pro), max 15s

image_url.description: URL of the portrait image for avatar (JPEG, PNG, WEBP, max 10MB)

audio_url.description: URL of the audio file for the avatar to speak (MPEG, WAV, AAC, MP4, OGG, max 10MB)

prompt.description: Text prompt to guide video generation (emotions, expressions, scene settings)

quality.description: Video quality: standard (720P, faster) or pro (1080P, higher quality)

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications

name: kling_video
description: Generate videos using Kling 3.0 AI - supports 3-15s flexible duration, native multilingual audio, multi-shot storytelling, character elements, and std/pro quality modes

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired video content (max 5000 characters). For audio: use [Character name, voice style] format for dialogue

image_urls.description: Up to 2 image URLs: first = start frame, second = end frame (optional - if not provided, uses text-to-video)

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of video (text-to-video mode only)

mode.description: Quality mode: 'std' for standard (faster, cheaper), 'pro' for professional quality

sound.description: Enable native audio generation including multilingual speech, sound effects, and ambient sound. Pricing: with audio is 2x credits

multi_shots.description: Enable multi-shot mode for cinematic storytelling with multiple scenes (requires multi_prompt)

multi_prompt.description: Array of shot definitions for multi-shot mode. Each shot has a prompt and duration (1-12s)

prompt.description: Scene description for this shot

duration.description: Duration of this shot in seconds (1-12)

kling_elements.description: Character/object elements for consistent identity across shots. Provide name, description, and reference images/videos

element_input_urls.description: Reference image URLs for this element

element_input_video_urls.description: Reference video URLs for this element

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: list_tasks
description: List recent tasks with their status

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return

name: midjourney_generate
description: Generate images and videos using Midjourney AI models (unified tool for text-to-image, image-to-image, style reference, omni reference, and video generation)

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image or video (max 2000 characters)

taskType.description: Task type for generation mode (auto-detected if not provided)

fileUrl.description: Single image URL for image-to-image or video generation (legacy - use fileUrls instead)

fileUrls.description: Array of image URLs for image-to-image or video generation (recommended)

speed.description: Generation speed (not required for video/omni tasks)

variety.description: Controls diversity of generated results (0-100, increment by 5)

stylization.description: Artistic style intensity (0-1000, suggested multiple of 50)

weirdness.description: Creativity and uniqueness level (0-3000, suggested multiple of 100)

ow.description: Omni intensity parameter for omni reference tasks (1-1000)

videoBatchSize.description: Number of videos to generate (video mode only)

motion.description: Motion level for video generation (required for video mode)

high_definition_video.description: Use high definition video generation instead of standard definition

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: nano_banana_image
description: Generate and edit images using Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Image (Nano Banana 2) - unified tool with 4K support, up to 14 reference images, Google Search grounding, and improved text rendering. Pricing: 8 credits/1K, 12/2K, 18/4K

prompt.description: Text prompt for image generation or editing (max 20000 chars). Nano Banana models support up to 20K characters.

image_input.description: Array of reference image URLs for editing mode (up to 14 images for multi-reference)

google_search.description: Enable Google Search grounding for factual image generation

name: qwen_image
description: Generate and edit images using Qwen models (unified tool for both text-to-image and image editing)

prompt.description: Text prompt for image generation or editing

image_url.description: URL of image to edit (optional - if not provided, uses text-to-image)

num_inference_steps.description: Number of inference steps (2-250 for text-to-image, 2-49 for edit)

guidance_scale.description: CFG scale (0-20, default: 2.5 for text-to-image, 4 for edit)

num_images.description: Number of images (1-4, edit mode only)

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: recraft_remove_background
description: Remove backgrounds from images using Recraft AI background removal model

image.description: URL of image to remove background from (PNG, JPG, WEBP, max 5MB, 16MP, 4096px max, 256px min)

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: runway_aleph_video
description: Transform videos using Runway Aleph video-to-video generation with AI-powered editing

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired video transformation (max 1000 characters)

videoUrl.description: URL of the input video to transform

waterMark.description: Watermark text to add to the video

uploadCn.description: Whether to upload to China servers

aspectRatio.description: Aspect ratio of the output video

referenceImage.description: URL of reference image for style guidance

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: suno_generate_music
description: Generate music with AI using Suno models (V3_5, V4, V4_5, V4_5PLUS, V5)

prompt.description: Description of the desired audio content. In custom mode: used as exact lyrics (max 5000 chars for V4_5+, V5; 3000 for V3_5, V4). In non-custom mode: core idea for auto-generated lyrics (max 500 chars)

customMode.description: Enable advanced parameter customization. If true: requires style and title. If false: simplified mode with only prompt required

instrumental.description: Generate instrumental music (no lyrics). In custom mode: if true, only style and title required; if false, prompt used as exact lyrics

callBackUrl.description: URL to receive task completion updates (optional, will use KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

style.description: Music style/genre (required in custom mode, max 1000 chars for V4_5+, V5; 200 for V3_5, V4)

title.description: Track title (required in custom mode, max 80 chars)

negativeTags.description: Music styles to exclude (optional, max 200 chars)

vocalGender.description: Vocal gender preference (optional, only effective in custom mode)

styleWeight.description: Strength of style adherence (optional, range 0-1, up to 2 decimal places)

weirdnessConstraint.description: Controls experimental/creative deviation (optional, range 0-1, up to 2 decimal places)

audioWeight.description: Balance weight for audio features (optional, range 0-1, up to 2 decimal places)

name: topaz_upscale_image
description: Upscale and enhance images using Topaz Labs AI upscaler. Increases resolution with high-fidelity detail restoration, natural texture reconstruction, and improved clarity. Supports 1x-8x upscaling (max output 20,000px per side). Pricing: 10 credits (≤2K), 20 credits (4K), 40 credits (8K).

image_url.description: URL of image to upscale (JPEG, PNG, WEBP, max 10MB)

upscale_factor.description: Upscale factor: 1x (enhance only), 2x (default), 4x, or 8x. Max output dimension is 20,000px.

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: veo3_generate_video
description: Generate professional-quality videos using Google's Veo3 API

prompt.description: Text prompt describing desired video content

imageUrls.description: Image URLs for image-to-video generation: 1 image (video unfolds around it) or 2 images (first=start frame, second=end frame)

watermark.description: Watermark text to add to video

callBackUrl.description: Callback URL for task completion notifications

enableFallback.description: Enable fallback mechanism for content policy failures (Note: fallback videos cannot use 1080P endpoint)

enableTranslation.description: Auto-translate prompts to English for better results

name: veo3_get_1080p_video
description: Get 1080P high-definition version of a Veo3 video (not available for fallback mode videos)

task_id.description: Veo3 task ID to get 1080p video for

index.description: Video index (optional, for multiple video results)

name: wan_animate
description: Animate static images or replace characters in videos using Alibaba's Wan 2.2 Animate models with motion transfer and seamless environmental integration

video_url.description: URL of the reference video (MP4, QUICKTIME, X-MATROSKA, max 10MB, max 30 seconds)

image_url.description: URL of the character image (JPEG, PNG, WEBP, max 10MB). Will be resized and center-cropped to match video aspect ratio.

mode.description: Animation mode: 'animate' transfers motion/expressions from video to image, 'replace' swaps the character in video with the image

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)

name: wan_video
description: Generate videos using Alibaba Wan 2.7 (text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, video-edit with native audio support)

mode.description: Generation mode: text-to-video (default), image-to-video, reference-to-video, or video-edit. Auto-detected from parameters if omitted.

prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation (max 5000 characters)

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to describe content to avoid (max 500 characters)

audio_url.description: Audio URL for text-to-video with audio (T2V mode only)

first_frame_url.description: URL of first frame image for image-to-video mode

last_frame_url.description: URL of last frame image for image-to-video mode

first_clip_url.description: URL of first video clip for image-to-video mode

driving_audio_url.description: Audio URL to drive facial expressions (I2V mode)

reference_image.description: Reference images for reference-to-video mode (up to 5)

reference_video.description: Reference videos for reference-to-video mode (up to 5)

reference_voice.description: Voice reference URL for R2V mode

first_frame.description: First frame image URL for R2V mode

reference_image_edit.description: Reference image URL for video-edit mode

audio_setting.description: Audio handling for video-edit: auto or origin

ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video

prompt_extend.description: Enable prompt rewriting using LLM for better results

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications

name: z_image
description: Generate photorealistic images using Tongyi-MAI Z-Image model. Ultra-fast Turbo performance, accurate bilingual text rendering (Chinese/English), strong semantic understanding. Pricing: ~$0.004/image

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image (max 5000 characters). Supports bilingual prompts.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image

callBackUrl.description: Optional: URL for task completion notifications (uses KIE_AI_CALLBACK_URL env var if not provided)
